nasb.text: And Jesus looked at him and said, “How hard it is for those who are wealthy to enter the kingdom of God!

esv.text: Jesus, seeing that he had become sad, said, “How difficult it is for those who have wealth to enter the kingdom of God!

cnv.text: 耶穌見他這樣，就說：“富有的人要進　神的國，是多麼難哪！

ccb.text: 耶稣见状，就说；“有钱人进上帝的国真难啊！

csbs.text: 耶稣看见他变得很忧愁，就说：“有钱财的人进入神的国，是多么困难！
